title: Sold HVAC company in a fast growing community
reasonForSelling: Owner has decided to make a career change.
supportTraining: Seller is willing to stay on up to 60 days to ensure a successful transition.
description:
Great Reputation, Good Business, Strong Client Base, Cash flow daily.
The HVAC industry is growing fast and this area of Oklahoma has unlimited opportunities for growth. This business has been open for three years and is already a market leader. Their revenue has been over $1,000,000 every year including its first year in 2022. This is a great time to buy this business. The value of this business will only get higher in the next few years. This is one of the fastest growing areas in the state of Oklahoma. Today, this area is a popular destination known for cabins, restaurants, wineries, breweries and outdoor activities.

Ad#:2431469
